description: Nick Saraev-style talking head video format for automation and AI content

creator_profile.name: Nick Saraev
creator_profile.niche: AI automation, no-code tools, agency building
creator_profile.style: Educational talking head with fast-paced, value-dense delivery
creator_profile.audience: Entrepreneurs, freelancers, agency owners looking to leverage automation

examples: Stop building funnels. Here's what to do instead.
This AI tool replaced my entire team.
I made $50,000 in a week with this automation.
90% of coaches are doing this wrong.

introduction.template: I've [credibility marker]. Today I'm going to show you [specific outcome]. By the end of this video, you'll [benefit].

rising_action.pacing: Fast cuts, minimal pauses, high information density

climax.purpose: Deliver the 'aha moment' or key insight

resolution.purpose: Recap, CTA, loop back to hook
techniques: Tease next video or related content

hook_templates: This {tool} automation saves me {hours} hours a week
Automate your entire {process} in {minutes} minutes
Stop doing {task} manually. Here's the fix.

ai_business_insights.description: How to leverage AI for business growth
hook_templates: AI just replaced {job_function}
This AI workflow makes {outcome}
The {industry} is about to change forever
How I built a {revenue} agency in {timeframe}
Stop charging by the hour. Do this instead.
The {number} clients you need to hit {goal}
Delete your to-do list. Here's why.
The {time} morning routine that changed everything
Stop using {popular_app}. Try this instead.

camera.framing: Medium close-up, centered or rule of thirds
camera.movement: Minimal camera movement, cuts for emphasis

editing.pacing: Fast - cut out all pauses and filler words
editing.jump_cuts: Heavy use of jump cuts for energy
editing.b_roll: Minimal - mostly talking head with screen share

audio.music: Light background music (optional), lower during speech

graphics.lower_thirds: Name and title on first appearance
graphics.callouts: Arrows, circles, highlights on screen shares

youtube_shorts.structure: Hook + one key insight + mini CTA

x_twitter.duration: 30-60 seconds for video, or text thread
x_twitter.text_version: Thread format with hook as first tweet
x_twitter.posting_frequency: 3-5x daily, mix of video and text

tiktok.trends: Adapt to trending sounds/formats when relevant

linkedin.text_version: Long-form post with hook, insights, CTA

step_2.criteria: Best hooks, key insights, quotable moments

sunday.action: Plan and script next week's content

automation_tutorial.hook: [Result] in [Timeframe] using [Tool]. Let me show you.
automation_tutorial.intro: I've helped {number} businesses automate this exact process. Here's the step-by-step.
automation_tutorial.cta: Link in bio to get the template. See you in the next one.

contrarian_insight.intro: I know this sounds crazy, but hear me out.
contrarian_insight.cta: If this changed how you think, follow for more. Link in bio.

case_study.hook: [Result] in [Timeframe]. Here's exactly what I did.
case_study.intro: [Number] months ago, I was [starting point]. Now I'm [current state].
case_study.cta: Want the full breakdown? Link in bio. Follow for more.

tool_comparison.hook: [Tool A] vs [Tool B]: One of these is a complete waste of money.
tool_comparison.intro: I've used both extensively. Here's the honest truth.
tool_comparison.cta: Save this for later. Follow for more tool breakdowns.

fitness_adaptation.description: How to apply Nick Saraev style to fitness content

workout_tutorials.adaptation: Step-by-step exercise guides with form cues
hook_templates: This exercise builds {muscle_group} 2x faster
Stop doing {exercise} like this. Here's the fix.
The {exercise} technique nobody talks about
Your {training_split} is wrong. Here's why.
This training principle changed everything
The science behind {concept} (simplified)
How I built a {revenue} coaching business
Stop trading time for money as a trainer
The {number} clients you need for {income}
My {time} morning routine for gains
The meal prep system that takes {minutes} minutes
Stop tracking {metric}. Track this instead.
